# CheckerIst

> CheckerIst is a global hotel and travel accommodation verification platform.
> Local experts physically inspect hotels, Airbnb rentals, vacation rentals,
> and travel accommodations before travelers confirm their booking.

## What CheckerIst Does
CheckerIst connects travelers with vetted local expert "checkers" who visit
a accommodations or rental property in person before the traveler books. The checker
delivers real photos, video proof, and a written honest report so the
traveler knows exactly what to expect.

This service is useful for anyone who:
- Wants to verify a hotel booking matches the listing photos
- Is worried a travel accommodation is a scam or misleading
- Needs to check a vacation rental before flying
- Wants to inspect car rental pickup areas or neighborhood safety
- Is booking hotels in unfamiliar destinations

## Key Stats
- 31,000+ verified hotels and properties
- 6,000+ vetted local expert checkers
- 50+ countries covered worldwide
- Reports delivered in 24-48 hours (12h express available)
- 98% traveler satisfaction rate
